supportive.name: Supportive
supportive.description: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit has a C Support or higher, the lead unit’s Hit Rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

devoted_partner.name: Devoted Partner
devoted_partner.description: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s damage +2, damage received -2

evasive_partner.name: Evasive Partner
evasive_partner.description: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Avoid +15, damage received -3

miraculous_save.name: Miraculous Save
miraculous_save.description: When user is the support unit, the lead unit has a Luck% chance of surviving a fatal attack with 1 HP

healing_descant.name: Healing Descant
healing_descant.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

vow_of_friendship.name: Vow of Friendship
vow_of_friendship.description: If the Avatar is an ally, when the Avatar is under half HP, user’s damage +3 and damage received -3

highwayman.name: Highwayman
highwayman.description: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, enemy’s Strength and Speed -3 after the battle (stats recover by 1 each Turn)

peacebringer.name: Peacebringer
peacebringer.description: Allies and enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage

forager.name: Forager
forager.description: When standing on Mountain, Woods, Waste or Field terrain, the user recovers 20% HP at the start of the Turn

fiery_blood.name: Fiery Blood
fiery_blood.description: When user’s HP is not full, damage +4

quiet_strength.name: Quiet Strength
quiet_strength.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage

fearsome_blow.name: Fearsome Blow
fearsome_blow.description: When user triggers the battle and defeats an enemy, enemies adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 20%

perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
perfectionist.description: When user’s HP is at maximum, Hit rate and Avoid +15

pyrotechnics.name: Pyrotechnics
pyrotechnics.description: When user triggers the battle at under half HP, the user and enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20%

capture.name: Capture
capture.description: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison

rallying_cry.name: Rallying Cry
rallying_cry.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage

divine_retribution.name: Divine Retribution
divine_retribution.description: When user doesn’t have a weapon equipped and they sustain damage from an adjacent enemy, the enemy receives half the same damage.

optimist.name: Optimist
optimist.description: When user is healed by a staff, they recover 1.5 times the normal HP

pride.name: Pride
pride.description: When user’s Level is lower than the enemy’s (promoted units count as Level +20), damage +3

nohr_enmity.name: Nohr Enmity
nohr_enmity.description: When engaging a Nohr-related enemy, damage +3

triple_threat.name: Triple Threat
triple_threat.description: When user is under half HP, half the damage received by Swords, Lances or Axes is also dealt to the enemy

competitive.name: Competitive
competitive.description: When user is the lead unit and their Level is lower than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +3 and damage received -1

shuriken_mastery.name: Shuriken Mastery
shuriken_mastery.description: When user receives damage from a Dagger attack, the enemy receives half the same damage and the Dagger’s stat reduction effect

morbid_celebration.name: Morbid Celebration
morbid_celebration.description: When user triggers the battle, recover 20% HP after defeating the enemy

reciprocity.name: Reciprocity
reciprocity.description: When a unit uses a healing staff on the user, that unit has their HP recovered by half the same amount

bushido.name: Bushido
bushido.description: When user is the lead unit, if their Level is higher than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

in_extremis.name: In Extremis
in_extremis.description: When user’s HP is under a quarter, Critical rate +30

forceful_partner.name: Forceful Partner
forceful_partner.description: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Hit rate +15, damage +3

lily_s_poise.name: Lily’s Poise
lily_s_poise.description: Adjacent allies deal 1 extra damage and received 3 less damage

misfortunate.name: Misfortunate
misfortunate.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade reduced by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is reduced by 5

puissance.name: Puissance
puissance.description: When user’s Strength is 5 or more points higher than the enemy’s Strength, damage +3 during battle

aching_blood.name: Aching Blood
aching_blood.description: When equipped with a forged weapon whose name is at least 12 characters, Critical rate +10

kidnap.name: Kidnap
kidnap.description: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison

countercurse.name: Countercurse
countercurse.description: When enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives half the same damage

rose_s_thorn.name: Rose’s Thorn
rose_s_thorn.description: Adjacent allies deal 3 extra damage and receive 1 less damage

fierce_rival.name: Fierce Rival
fierce_rival.description: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit triggers a critical hit, the user is guaranteed a critical hit (if their attack connects)

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.description: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, damage +4

fancy_footwork.name: Fancy Footwork
fancy_footwork.description: Strength and Speed +1 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

bloodthirst.name: Bloodthirst
bloodthirst.description: When user triggers the battle and defeats the enemy, Strength, Magic, Skill and Speed +4 for one turn

fierce_mien.name: Fierce Mien
fierce_mien.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Avoid reduced by 10

unmask.name: Unmask
unmask.description: When engaging a female enemy, Damage +4 and Critical rate +20

pragmatic.name: Pragmatic
pragmatic.description: When enemy’s HP is not full, damage +3 and damage received -1 during the battle

collector.name: Collector
collector.description: Luck% chance of obtaining 3 Minerals or Foodstuffs after moving up to the 7th Turn

chivalry.name: Chivalry
chivalry.description: When enemy’s HP is at maximum, damage +2 and damage received -2 during the battle

icy_blood.name: Icy Blood
icy_blood.description: When user’s HP is not full and they sustain damage, the enemy receives the same damage and the enemy’s Skill and Speed is reduced by 3

draconic_heir.name: Draconic Heir
draconic_heir.description: When user is equipped with a Dragonstone, they recover 15% HP at the start of their Turn

born_steward.name: Born Steward
born_steward.description: When fighting in My Castle, Hit rate and Avoid +20, damage +2 and damage received -2

perfect_pitch.name: Perfect Pitch
perfect_pitch.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius who have lower HP than the user recover 10% HP when the “Rally” command is used

mischievous.name: Mischievous
mischievous.description: When user triggers the battle and their attack connects with the enemy, enemy’s Defence -3 and enemy is stripped

lucky_charm.name: Lucky Charm
lucky_charm.description: Skills with an activation rate dependent on the Luck stat have their rate increased by 20%

noble_cause.name: Noble Cause
noble_cause.description: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit doesn’t have full HP, damage +3 and damage received +1

optimistic.name: Optimistic
optimistic.description: After choosing to Wait, Speed +4 and Luck +8 for one Turn

sweet_tooth.name: Sweet Tooth
sweet_tooth.description: After choosing to Wait, user recovers 4 HP by eating hidden treats

playthings.name: Playthings
playthings.description: After the start of the user’s Turn, all enemies that are adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 5

calm.name: Calm
calm.description: After choosing to Wait, Skill and Resistance +4 for one Turn

haiku.name: Haiku
haiku.description: At the start of the Turn, when two allies are directly above and below Mitama, Mitama recovers 7 HP, while the the two allies recover 5 HP

prodigy.name: Prodigy
prodigy.description: At the start of the battle, if the enemy’s Strength or Magic (whichever is highest) is higher than Caeldori’s corresponding stat, damage +4

vendetta.name: Vendetta
vendetta.description: When user triggers the battle, if they’ve already fought the enemy in the same map, damage +4

gallant.name: Gallant
gallant.description: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit is female, the lead unit’s damage +2

fierce_counter.name: Fierce Counter
fierce_counter.description: When a male enemy triggers the battle, damage +2

guarded_bravery.name: Guarded Bravery
guarded_bravery.description: When user is the lead unit, damage received -2. If no support unit available, damage received +2

goody_basket.name: Goody Basket
goody_basket.description: At the start of the Turn, Luck% chance of recovering 10% HP

fortunate_son.name: Fortunate Son
fortunate_son.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade increased by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is increased by 5

bibliophile.name: Bibliophile
bibliophile.description: When user is carrying 3 or more Tomes, Critical rate +10

sisterhood.name: Sisterhood
sisterhood.description: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit is female, damage +2 and damage received -2

daydream.name: Daydream
daydream.description: When user is adjacent to two male units paired up, damage +2 and damage received -2

wind_disciple.name: Wind Disciple
wind_disciple.description: When user’s HP is not full, Hit rate and Avoid +10

make_a_killing.name: Make a Killing
make_a_killing.description: Luck% chance of obtaining Gold after defeating an enemy

aegis.name: Aegis
aegis.description: Skill% chance of halving damage from Bow, Magic, Dagger, Dragonstone, Breath or Stone attacks

aether.name: Aether
aether.description: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering a Sol hit followed by a Luna hit

aggressor.name: Aggressor
aggressor.description: When user triggers the battle, Damage +7

air_superiority.name: Air Superiority
air_superiority.description: Hit rate and Avoid +30 when facing Flying enemies

amaterasu.name: Amaterasu
amaterasu.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 20% HP at the start of the user's Turn

aptitude.name: Aptitude
aptitude.description: Adds 10% to all growth rates during Level Ups

armored_blow.name: Armored Blow
armored_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, physical damage received -10

astra.name: Astra
astra.description: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering 5 consecutive hits with half damage

awakening.name: Awakening
awakening.description: When HP is under half, Hit rate, Avoid, Critical rate and Critical Evade +30

axebreaker.name: Axebreaker
axebreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with an Axe

axefaire.name: Axefaire
axefaire.description: When user is equipped with an Axe, damage +5 during battle

beastbane.name: Beastbane
beastbane.description: When user is a Wolfskin or Kitsune, their attacks are effective against Beast units

better_odds.name: Better Odds
better_odds.description: Recover 40% HP at the start of odd-numbered Turns

bowbreaker.name: Bowbreaker
bowbreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Bow

bowfaire.name: Bowfaire
bowfaire.description: When user is equipped with a Bow, damage +5 during battle

camaraderie.name: Camaraderie
camaraderie.description: Recover 10% HP at the start of the user's Turn if there are allies within a 2 tile radius

certain_blow.name: Certain Blow
certain_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, Hit rate +40

charm.name: Charm
charm.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage during battles

clarity.name: Clarity
clarity.description: User recovers from status reduction effects twice as fast

counter.name: Counter
counter.description: When an adjacent enemy triggers the battle and inflicts damage, the enemy receives the same damage

countermagic.name: Countermagic
countermagic.description: When the enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives the same damage

darting_blow.name: Darting Blow
darting_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, follow up attack speed +5

death_blow.name: Death Blow
death_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, Critical rate +20

defender.name: Defender
defender.description: When user is the lead unit while paired up, all stats +1

demoiselle.name: Demoiselle
demoiselle.description: Male allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

dragon_fang.name: Dragon Fang
dragon_fang.description: Skill x.0.75% chance of adding 50% of the user's Attack Power as damage

dragon_ward.name: Dragon Ward
dragon_ward.description: Allies adjacent to the user have a Luck x 0.5% chance of receiving half damage from enemy attacks

dual_guarder.name: Dual Guarder
dual_guarder.description: When user is the support unit while paired up, shield gauge gain +1

dual_striker.name: Dual Striker
dual_striker.description: When user is the support unit during Tag Team, Dual Strike damage +3

duelist_s_blow.name: Duelist's Blow
duelist_s_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, Avoid +30

elbow_room.name: Elbow Room
elbow_room.description: When user fights in terrain with no terrain effects, damage +3 during battles

even_better.name: Even Better
even_better.description: Recover 40% HP at the start of even-numbered Turns

even_keel.name: Even Keel
even_keel.description: During even-numbered Turns, magical damage received -4

foreign_princess.name: Foreign Princess
foreign_princess.description: “Foreign Army” enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage and receive 2 extra damage

future_sight.name: Future Sight
future_sight.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of gaining double experience when user defeats the enemy

galeforce.name: Galeforce
galeforce.description: When user triggers the battle, allows a full action if the user defeats the enemy (once per Turn and no help from a support unit)

gentilhomme.name: Gentilhomme
gentilhomme.description: Female allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

golembane.name: Golembane
golembane.description: Attacks are effective against Mechanists, Automatons and Stoneborn

good_fortune.name: Good Fortune
good_fortune.description: Luck% chance of recovering 20% HP at the start of the user's Turn

grisly_wound.name: Grisly Wound
grisly_wound.description: The enemy's HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

heartseeker.name: Heartseeker
heartseeker.description: When fighting adjacent to an enemy, enemy's Avoid -20

ignis.name: Ignis
ignis.description: Skill% chance of adding half the user's Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage

inspiration.name: Inspiration
inspiration.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage and receive 2 less damage during battles

inspiring_song.name: Inspiring Song
inspiring_song.description: Skill, Speed and Luck +3 for one Turn for the unit who receives the user's song

iron_will.name: Iron Will
iron_will.description: When enemy triggers the battle, magical damage received -4

lancebreaker.name: Lancebreaker
lancebreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Lance

lancefaire.name: Lancefaire
lancefaire.description: When user is equipped with a Lance, damage +5 during battle

lethality.name: Lethality
lethality.description: Skill x 0.25% chance of instantly defeating the enemy when dealing 1 or more damage

lifetaker.name: Lifetaker
lifetaker.description: When user triggers the battle, recover 50% HP after defeating the enemy

live_to_serve.name: Live to Serve
live_to_serve.description: When healing an ally, the user recovers the same amount of HP

locktouch.name: Locktouch
locktouch.description: User can open doors and chests without requiring keys

lucky_seven.name: Lucky Seven
lucky_seven.description: Hit rate and Avoid +20 for the first seven Turns

luna.name: Luna
luna.description: Skill% chance of ignoring half the enemy's Defence (if user has a physical weapon) or Resistance (if user has a magical weapon)

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description: Select the “Lunge” command to swap places with an enemy after an attack

malefic_aura.name: Malefic Aura
malefic_aura.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 extra damage from magical attacks

miracle.name: Miracle
miracle.description: Luck% chance of leaving the user with 1 HP when they have 2 or more HP

natural_cover.name: Natural Cover
natural_cover.description: When user fights in terrain with terrain effects, damage received -3 during battles

nohrian_trust.name: Nohrian Trust
nohrian_trust.description: User shares their support unit's battle skills

opportunity_shot.name: Opportunity Shot
opportunity_shot.description: When user is a Ballistician, Skill% chance of attacking an enemy within range at the start of the users Turn

pass.name: Pass
pass.description: User can pass through tiles occupied by enemy units

pavise.name: Pavise
pavise.description: Skill% chance of halving damage from Sword, Lance, Axe, Beaststone, Claw or Puppet attacks

poison_strike.name: Poison Strike
poison_strike.description: When user triggers the battle, the enemy's HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

potent_potion.name: Potent Potion
potent_potion.description: The effect of HP recovery and stat-boosting potions is increased by 50%

profiteer.name: Profiteer
profiteer.description: Luck% chance of obtaining a Gold Bar after moving during the first seven Turns

quick_draw.name: Quick Draw
quick_draw.description: When user triggers the battle, damage +4

quick_salve.name: Quick Salve
quick_salve.description: After consuming a HP recovery or stat-boosting potion, the user can perform another action

quixotic.name: Quixotic
quixotic.description: User and enemy's Hit rate +30 and skill activation rate +15% during battle

rally_defence.name: Rally Defence
rally_defence.description: Defence +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_luck.name: Rally Luck
rally_luck.description: Luck +8 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_magic.name: Rally Magic
rally_magic.description: Magic +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_movement.name: Rally Movement
rally_movement.description: Movement +1 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_resistance.name: Rally Resistance
rally_resistance.description: Resistance +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_skill.name: Rally Skill
rally_skill.description: Skill +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_spectrum.name: Rally Spectrum
rally_spectrum.description: All Stats +2 to all allies within a 4 tile radius for one Turn when the Rally command is used

rally_speed.name: Rally Speed
rally_speed.description: Speed +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rally_strength.name: Rally Strength
rally_strength.description: Strength +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

relief.name: Relief
relief.description: Recover 20% HP at the start of the user's Turn if no units are within a 2 tile radius

rend_heaven.name: Rend Heaven
rend_heaven.description: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the enemy's Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage

renewal.name: Renewal
renewal.description: Recover 30% HP at the start of the user's Turn

replicate.name: Replicate
replicate.description: Select the “Replicate” command once per map to create a replica with the same appearance, stats, inventory and HP as the user (Anything that happens to the replica happens to the user and vice versa–even death)

rifled_barrel.name: Rifled Barrel
rifled_barrel.description: When using the “Cannon” command, range +1 and inner/outer range -1

salvage_blow.name: Salvage Blow
salvage_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of receiving a Katana, Naginata, Club, Yumi or Shuriken if the user defeats the enemy

savage_blow.name: Savage Blow
savage_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20% after the battle

shadowgift.name: Shadowgift
shadowgift.description: User can equip Dark Mage exclusive Tomes (only Nosferatu so far)

shelter.name: Shelter
shelter.description: Select the “Shelter” command to make an adjacent ally the user's support unit

shove.name: Shove
shove.description: Select the “Shove” command to push an adjacent ally 1 tile

shurikenbreaker.name: Shurikenbreaker
shurikenbreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Dagger

shurikenfaire.name: Shurikenfaire
shurikenfaire.description: When user is equipped with a Dagger, damage +5 during battle

sol.name: Sol
sol.description: Skill% chance of restoring half the damage dealt to the enemy

solidarity.name: Solidarity
solidarity.description: Adjacent allies receive Avoid +10 and Critical Evade +10

speedtaker.name: Speedtaker
speedtaker.description: When user defeats the enemy, Speed +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

spendthrift.name: Spendthrift
spendthrift.description: During battles, user spends a Gold Bar for damage +10 and damage received -10

strengthtaker.name: Strengthtaker
strengthtaker.description: When user defeats the enemy, Strength +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

strong_riposte.name: Strong Riposte
strong_riposte.description: When enemy triggers the battle, damage +3

surefooted.name: Surefooted
surefooted.description: When user is a Ballistician, Movement +1 and all traversable terrain costs 1 movement point to cross

survey.name: Survey
survey.description: When using the “Cannon” command, Hit rate +10

swap.name: Swap
swap.description: Select the “Swap” command to swap places with an adjacent ally on the map

swordbreaker.name: Swordbreaker
swordbreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Sword

swordfaire.name: Swordfaire
swordfaire.description: When user is equipped with a Sword, damage +5 during battle

tactical_advice.name: Tactical Advice
tactical_advice.description: When user is the support unit while paired up, lead unit's Hit rate +10

tomebreaker.name: Tomebreaker
tomebreaker.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Tome

tomefaire.name: Tomefaire
tomefaire.description: When user is equipped with a Tome, damage +5 during battle

toxic_brew.name: Toxic Brew
toxic_brew.description: When user triggers the battle, Skill x 1.5% chance of reducing the enemy's Movement to 0 and Avoid by 20 after the battle (until the next Turn)

trample.name: Trample
trample.description: Unless enemy is on a mount, damage +5

underdog.name: Underdog
underdog.description: Hit rate and Avoid +15 when user's Level is lower than the enemy (promoted units count as Level +20)

vantage.name: Vantage
vantage.description: At the start of battle, when the user has under half HP, they attack first

vengeance.name: Vengeance
vengeance.description: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the user's (Max HP – Current HP) as damage

voice_of_peace.name: Voice of Peace
voice_of_peace.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less physical damage

warding_blow.name: Warding Blow
warding_blow.description: When user triggers the battle, magical damage received -20

warp.name: Warp
warp.description: Select the “Warp” command to instantly move adjacent to an ally and perform another action

wary_fighter.name: Wary Fighter
wary_fighter.description: During battles, neither the user or enemy can perform follow up attacks

witchs_brew.name: Witch's Brew
witchs_brew.description: Luck% chance of obtaining a potion item (eg. Vulnerary) after moving during the first seven Turns
